svg.title: pandyaHomeLab source-control and deployment flow
svg.desc: GitHub at top is the central source of truth. NAS source tree pulls from GitHub on the routine path; both dev-nas and prod-nas stacks build container images from this single source tree. Container images push to ECR and AWS EC2 pulls them. A contingency path connects a laptop clone to GitHub via dashed arrows, used only when NAS access is unavailable.
svg.text: Stage 2 in-progress preview · subject to revision as ADRs 008–012 lock

g.text: Central source of truth · main branch authoritative
One git clone · serves both stacks · edited via VS Code Remote-SSH
Container images built locally on NAS
Stateless serving · pulls images, no source code

svg.text: Solid arrows · routine flows · Dashed arrows · contingency or conditional paths
